scenario_name: Scenario 12 — Pattern Matching with Existing Codebase
justification: All rubric criteria met: file paths follow kebab-case pattern (.tmp/warehouses/warehouse-*.ts), WarehouseRepository is an interface, WarehouseService injects repository via constructor, AppError is reused from ../shared/app-error (no new error class), error code is WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND matching the pattern, updateCapacity calls repo.save, tests use mock repository (jest.fn()), and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 3 ACs explicitly.

observations.text: Exact structural match to ProductService pattern confirmed
AppError reused from shared module, not reinvented
All 5 tests passing with correct mock pattern
AC3 includes both happy path (save called) and error path (no spurious save)
Agent verified existing files against spec before claiming completion
